description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a flat roof and a mix of black and white exterior finishes. The front facade features a prominent double garage with wooden doors, large rectangular windows, and a green accent above the garage. The left side of the house has a tall, arched window and a balcony, while the right side includes a white section with a secondary entrance and a small overhang. The rear of the house is simpler, with symmetrical window placement and a rooftop structure, possibly for utilities or access. The property is enclosed by a partial wall and includes a driveway with a car and a bicycle visible. The overall design blends modern and contemporary elements, with clean lines and a functional layout.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, black and white exterior, large windows, and a double garage. The design features clean lines, a balcony, and a partially enclosed driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, large windows, green accent, and main entry with a partial wall and driveway.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the white section, secondary entrance, and rooftop structure, with less window detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying symmetrical window arrangement, flat roof, and minimal decorative features.
description_view_3: Side view with black exterior, large windows, and a clear view of the balcony and partial wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and regular rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a simple door, no porch, and is integrated with a double garage and partial wall; minimal decorative elements.
